ApplicationReleaseArtifactType.description: Type of definition this artifact row holds. application = app-level (extensionReferences, defaultLocale, supportedLocales, translations); extension = one per in-app extension (extension root: dependsOn, defaultLocale, etc.); others = one row per definition with that type.

ApplicationReleaseArtifactDefinition.description: One row per piece of an application release. Stored in a separate resource/table from ApplicationReleaseDefinition. Full release snapshot can be assembled on demand. For in-app extensions, use many rows (entity, page, etc.) with extensionId set; one row per extension with artifactType extension for extension root.

applicationReleaseId.description: Application release this artifact belongs to.

definitionId.description: Id of the definition: applicationId for artifactType application; extensionId for artifactType extension; entity id, page id, etc. for other types.

extensionId.description: Set for artifacts that belong to an in-app extension (extensionDefinitions). Null for app-owned content and for artifactType application or extension.

snapshot.description: The definition JSON. Validates against the corresponding application meta model definition (EntityDefinition, PageDefinition, etc.) or application-level / extension-level shape.
